name: Navratan Korma#2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, melt butter and heat oil together.
2. Add whole garam masala and chopped green chillies; stir until fragrant.
3. Add ginger garlic paste and cook for a minute.
4. Incorporate onion paste (made by boiling onions and blending).
5. Mix in potatoes, carrots, French beans, baby corn, cauliflower, mushrooms.
6. Stir in yogurt, cashew nut paste, and season with salt.
7. Cover and simmer on low heat until vegetables are tender.
8. Add whole cashews and cream; stir well.
9. Serve hot with naan or rice.
This dish is a royal treat, meaning it has nine ingredients. Here they are all vegetable-based, though variations with cashews, raisins, etc., are possible.
